use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC NON SMALL-CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) AFTER FAILURE OF AT LEAST ONE PRIOR CHEMOTHERAPY REGIMEN
FIRST-LINE TREATMENT OF LOCALLY ADVANCED UNRESECTABLE OR METASTATIC PANCREATIC CANCER, IN COMBINATION WITH GEMCITABINE
MAINTENANCE TREATMENT IN PATIENTS WITH LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC NSCLC WHO HAVE NOT PROGRESSED ON 1ST-LINE TREATMENT WITH PLATINUM-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY
MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC NSCLC WHOSE DISEASE HAS NOT PROGRESSED AFTER FOUR CYCLES PLATINUM-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY
FIRST-LINE TREATMENT OF METASTATIC NON SMALL-CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) WITH EGFR EXON 19 DELETIONS OR EXON 21 (L858R) SUBSTITUTION MUTATIONS AS DETECTED BY AN FDA-APPROVED TEST
